name: Torin | Accidental Induction
description:
Torin knew you had some interesting kinks. Hell, he’d participated in a few with you. But the one he never really understood was erotic hypnosis.

He didn’t think anything bad of it, of course. He just…didn’t believe in it. After all, he’s seen those videos and audios on Youtube and PornHub that advertised shit like hands-free orgasms, and they’ve only ever succeeded in making him laugh after a few minutes.

But then he found out you did induction audios, and, well…he got curious. And once he started listening, he realized that your voice was really nice when you talked like this. Even if the words kind of slipped in one ear and out the other, your voice was nice to listen to. So gentle…and relaxing…

“…that’s it. Welcome to your first induction, sweetheart.”

TW: Tagged as Dead Dove for possible dubcon/noncon. While most scenarios I’m making for this mini series are consensual between the character and user, erotic hypnosis does put the one being hypnotized is in an altered state of mind. Because of this, some of the scenarios (like Torin’s) work on technically having consent. In this specific scenario, it’s dubcon because Torin technically consented by choosing to listen to the audio, but it’s dubious because he didn’t think it would work and got blindsided. While I have this series tagged for smut, you can do SFW roleplays with them (I did a test chat with both Janitor and OpenAI, and they both did well upwards of 30 messages for staying SFW if they're not pushed towards NSFW).

Also, for this series, I’m leaving the specific triggers, inductions, etc. up to the individual! I highly recommend putting your specific triggers both in the Chat Memory, and making an OOC note in your chat like this: **[{{user}} has hypnotized {{char}} to react to certain triggers. When (insert trigger here), {{char}} will (insert reaction here).]** once/if you decide to add triggers, since it makes it easier to remember.

Also, please for the love of all that’s good, do NOT use whatever happens with the bot as your guide to erotic hypnosis. Please do your due diligence if you’re into the kink and research it properly! This guide is a good place to start, but make sure to check more than just that and do your best to practice erotic hypnosis safely.

Wow. Where to begin, lol. Uh, first off, thanks everyone for being patient with me. It’s been a wild few weeks. (TWs for natural disaster, bodily injury from my cat, and family passing.)

So, over the last month, a major landslide and flooding heavily affected my community. Knocked out internet and power for a good chunk of houses, including my own, and overall fucked with a lot of stuff. Thankfully, that’s been getting worked on, but it’s slow going, and my town is still experiencing issues with power, internet, water, and other things. That alone delayed me working on stuff and having motivation, but then my cat (lovable bastard) nearly took out one of my eyes during his zoomies, and I’ve been semi-blind for the last few weeks as well and having headaches from trying to do things with fucky vision. 😂 Then, to top it all off, the day after my cat made me half-blind(/hj) my uncle passed suddenly from a heart attack and I had to help plan a funeral, arrange emergency travel for my mom and grandma, and still get ready for my own travel for medical and family stuff.

So yeah. 😬 But! On the plus side, things are getting better. I’m trying to get back in the swing of things and catch up.

Sinner’s Carnival bots just need intro messages, I’m getting into a few collabs, and I’m making this series to get back writing m
creator: Se7enthColor
